title: Iounias #2458
definition:
Junia = "youthful"

 1) a Christian woman at Rome, mentioned by Paul as one of his kinsfolk
    and fellow prisoners
nasbUsage:

 1) a Christian woman at Rome, mentioned by Paul as one of his kinsfolk
    and fellow prisoners

    NASB:  Junias, a kinsman of Paul:
